evidence: standards/enterprise/accessibility-global-readiness.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A user-facing literal remains outside the localization system only with Localization Owner approval, exact non-localizable rationale, owner, expiry, and migration plan.
statement: All user-facing copy uses the approved localization system with stable semantic keys, translator context, and named ownership; identifiers, URLs, event names, keys, and configuration remain distinct from copy.
